notes: V2 foundation uses Flask application factory, typed config, modular route registration and shared extension initialization.
SQLAlchemy 2 and Alembic are initialized without binding V2 to the old monolithic web/app.py structure.
Quality, Docker, design system and app shell artifacts are separated into scoped modules, templates and evidence.
Production SECRET_KEY validation, response hardening, sanitized error handling and request id propagation are in place.
No tenant data writes exist before the account and tenant milestone.
No secrets or production credentials were added.
Signal Workspace tokens, components, app shell, login placeholder and workbench placeholder are implemented.
Playwright screenshots and accessibility checks exist for the design system and app shell flows.
CI workflow, local check script, Dockerfile and docker-compose development baseline are present.
Docker CLI is not installed on this machine; docker runtime smoke is recorded as skipped in V2-01-007 evidence.
